  Thanks for contributing to MAP!
  Reminder: PRs target the `dev` branch, never `main`.
  Every PR must link to an issue. See CONTRIBUTING.md.

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, in one or two sentences? -->

## Linked issue

Closes #<!-- issue number --> <!-- required: no orphan PRs -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 📐 New pattern
- [ ] ✏️ Pattern improvement
- [ ] 🐞 Bug / correction
- [ ] 💡 Feature / tooling
- [ ] 📓 Docs
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR targets the **`dev`** branch (not `main`).
- [ ] My branch is typed (`pattern/…`, `feature/…`, `fix/…`, `docs/…`, `refactor/…`, `chore/…`).
- [ ] Commits follow **Conventional Commits** and reference the issue.
- [ ] It links to an approved issue above.

### For pattern PRs (new or improved)

- [ ] Uses the [pattern template](../blob/main/patterns/_template/PATTERN_TEMPLATE.md) — all required sections present.
- [ ] Content is **framework-agnostic**; trade-offs are explicit and honest.
- [ ] **When to use** and **When NOT to use** are concrete.
- [ ] Includes an **architecture diagram** (Mermaid or image in `assets/`).
- [ ] Any reference implementation is minimal, readable, and runs.
- [ ] **Related Patterns** and **References** are linked.
- [ ] Follows the [style guide](../blob/main/docs/style-guide.md); links are valid.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on, open questions, or follow-ups. -->
